title: Elytra to Hooded Crow Wings
description: Turn your Elytra into Hooded Crow's Wings!
body:
This is a small pack made to change Elytra wings into the wings of a Hooded Crow (native to Northern Europe!) I made this initially to match my Minecraft skin, but have since decided to upload it publicly.

![Elytra re-fashioned as the wings of a hooded crow, alongside their respective item textures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d952dae9cf8a2966358db41a7d9f3d148951530.png)

---

If you would like an **alternate** version of this pack which remakes Elytra as _Regular Crow's_ wings instead, you can see that here: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/elytra-to-crow-wings](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/elytra-to-crow-wings)
